calendar.matters:
ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-13-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Accounting Petition Re: Accounting #1, Final Distribution Filed By Personal Representative Debra L. Jones
Off Calendar Dec-15-2022 Text Ruling

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of New Petition
Off Calendar Dec-13-2022 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-13-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Debra Jones, in court, in propria persona, Personal Representative.

At the query of the court, Ms. Jones reports as to why she has failed to appear at the previous callings stating that she has been dealing with health issues and believed that the person who has been assisting her with this matter would appear on her behalf. The court and Ms. Jones discuss the status of the Estate specifically as to the status of Estate assets. After additional discussion and consideration by the court, the accounting petition filed by Ms. Jones on Jan-18-2022 and subsequently taken off calendar by the court on Oct-18-2022 is returned to today's calendar by order of the bench officer in open court with the intent to take the petition under submission.

The subject matters are taken off calendar. The Accounting Petition is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-18-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to in propria persona Executor Debra L. Jones to appear on Dec-13-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 to explain why she failed to appear. An Order to Show Cause as to why the court should not order Debra L. Jones to pay sanctions in the amount $250 for failure to appear is set for the same date. The Petition for Settlement of First and Final Account is taken off calendar for failure to respond to Examiner's Notes as was advised in the order to appear issued by the court on Aug-10-2022. A status hearing for the filing of a new, complete petition is set for Dec-13-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. If a new, complete petition is not filed by close of business on Nov-29-2022, the court will consider suspending the Executor at the Dec-13-2022 hearing.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-18-2022 Continued To Dec-13-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-09-2022 Continued To Oct-18-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Personal Representative Debra L. Jones, in propria persona, to appear on Oct-18-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 to explain why she failed to appear and why she has failed to respond to the Examiner's notes and why courtesy copies of the supplement to the petition, proof of service, and a proposed order have not been delivered to the assigned Examiner. The status hearing is also continued to that date. Debra L. Jones is instructed to formally file responses to the Examiner's notes by Oct-04-2022.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-19-2022 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-19-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Dec-08-2021 Continued To Jan-19-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Executor in propria persona Debra L. Jones to appear on Jan-19-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and for failure to close the estate. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Mar-24-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Feb-10-2021 Continued To Mar-24-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Debra Jones appeared by zoom in Propria Persona.

Ms. Jones requested a continuance to send the inventory and appraisal to the Probate Referee. The Court informed Ms. Jones that Mr. Kasolas is the appointed Referee, provided her with Mr. Kasolas' phone number, stated that the Referee needs to do an appraisal of all of the property of the estate that she listed and that she needs to file a notice of change of financial condition. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is continued to March 24, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
